div.h2: Implementation Grade Specification for Lock-Free Concurrency
div.p: Eliminates edge cases for empty/single-node queues using a persistent dummy node.

ul.li: ABA Problem: Mitigated via tagged pointers or GC (Hazard Pointers / RCU).
Memory Ordering: Requires memory_order_release for enqueuing and memory_order_acquire for head/tail reads to ensure visibility of Node->value.
